_meta.note: Institutional memory of decisions so the same discussions don't recur. Seeded from the Knowledge Discovery engagement.

accepted.decision: KUR (Decision-producing Knowledge / Raw Information) is MATRIYA's north-star KPI
LAW-EVIDENCE-001: no ranking/board line may exceed the evidence quality it is derived from
KUR audit uses 6 validation gates J0-J5 before any ranking is trusted; read-only metadata pass = v0.2
Build a System State / MRI layer (this folder) as MATRIYA's structural self-memory; morning run is differential
MATRIYA V5 vision canonized (knowledge->discovery engine): 5 knowledge layers + intelligence engines. Canonical doc: MATRIYA/VISION-V5.md; evidence-gated gap map: MATRIYA/VISION-V5-GAP-MAP.md

Option A: matriya-system revived as V5 Core (engine core only) after entry test — dead scaffold removed, read-only bridge to management DB (V5-CORE-GUARD), Mechanism Entity schema + POC-01. Charter: matriya-system/docs/V5-CORE.md
Single embedding standard for V5 Core: text-embedding-3-small, vector(1536). The 384-dim local store (matriya-back rag_documents) is a migration candidate; no new 384-dim tables
Gate: no Layer 3 (world knowledge ingestion) and no N-generator/hypothesis engine before POC-01 produces one real Mechanism Entity end-to-end (K->N requires reality validation per Kernel)

No new capability development: the only goal is Dry Run -> Live Evidence (npm run poc:01 on a real experiment). Mechanism Evolution and Boundary Library are recorded as gated designs (matriya-system/docs/POST-POC01-STRATEGY.md), opened only after a live POC-01

Project state = Validation, not Engineering. Agreed sequence: 1) POC-01 Live 2) Mechanism Evolution 3) Boundary Library 4) Project Digital Twin — each layer must rest on live evidence from the previous one, never on planning alone

verified_findings_as_constraints.finding: Priority ERP / LIMS are ABSENT — do not assume or build integration
matriya-system is an empty scaffold — do not treat as a live service
verified_findings_as_constraints.superseded: 2026-07-04 by D-006: revived as V5 Core; code exists and tests pass, but no live deployment/DB yet — still not a live service until POC-01 runs live

verified_findings_as_constraints.finding: Production RAG is empty — knowledge lives in Drive/Excel/email, not the platform
public/cockpit/snapshot.json is statically authored — its claimed generator (npm run cockpit:export in matriya-back) does not exist; do not treat cockpit as live engine output
Two disjoint vector spaces: rag_documents vector(384, local) vs management_vector vector(1536, OpenAI) — V5 unified retrieval requires federation or migration

pending.decision: Parse the 13 robust-core files to E3, then finalize Top-20 (J3-J5)
Re-enable / reconfigure the Google Drive intake sensor
GATED (after live POC-01): Mechanism Evolution — immutable claim versions (supersedes_claim_id), Evidence->Claim v1->Claim v2->Law Candidate chain
GATED (after live POC-01): Boundary Library — structural boundaries as first-class entity (failed condition + evidence + rules_out mechanisms + opens research directions); basis for B->N per FSCTM
Run POC-01 LIVE: provision V5 Supabase (sql/001), read-only management key, npm run poc:01 — unblocks Layer 3, P-004, P-005
GATED (after P-004+P-005 deliver live entities): Project Digital Twin — unification layer per project (mechanisms + evidence + boundaries + decisions); realizes Project Intelligence from the vision

deprecated_or_deferred.decision: Knowledge Graph -> Ontology: DEFERRED until measurement layer (KUR) is trusted
